scripts.dev: cd .. && uv run python scripts/generate_api_docs.py && uv run python scripts/generate_cookbooks.py && cd docs && astro dev
scripts.start: cd .. && uv run python scripts/generate_api_docs.py && uv run python scripts/generate_cookbooks.py && cd docs && astro dev
